name: Lentil and Five Vegetable Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a stew pot, boil well-cleaned chopped leek and shredded carrot in water until tender.
2. Drain the vegetables well and add the remaining ingredients.
3. Cook until everything is well heated. You may want to add a bit of pre-cooked brown rice or your favorite herb seasoning.
Total Calories Per Serving: 168
Fat: 1 gram
